flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wiregrass Georgia Technical College fell 36% between 2006 and 2009 (38.3% → 24.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wiregrass Georgia Technical College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wiregrass Georgia Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wiregrass Georgia Technical College fell 41% between 2014 and 2017 ($3.5k → $2.1k).
